caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" and other graphics on the chest, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark desk featuring a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug with red text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". To his left is a white backdrop with repeating yellow stars and the word "HUSTLE" appearing multiple times. In the upper background, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A small logo in the bottom left corner displays "BOSS TALK". Across the sequence, the man remains seated and facing slightly to the left, maintaining a neutral expression. There is very little movement; he shifts his head and facial muscles slightly as he appears to be listening or preparing to speak, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
